description: An agent's trading state — portfolio value, PnL, live balances, trade feed, and signed transfers.
name: io.github.nirholas/portfolio-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the three.ws API that serves the portfolio + trades endpoints. Override only when self-hosting or targeting a preview deployment.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds for the live three.ws API reads.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Your three.ws session token (the value of the `__Host-sid` cookie from a signed-in browser). Required for the account-scoped reads — get_portfolio_summary, get_portfolio_history, get_portfolio_asset — which return data for the agents YOU own. The public trade feed and on-chain balance reads do not need it. Treat like a password.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_SESSION

environmentVariables.description: Solana mainnet RPC endpoint used by get_wallet_balances and send_transfer. Defaults to https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com — bring your own (Helius / QuickNode / Triton) for production traffic.
environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Base58-encoded Solana secret key for the wallet that send_transfer signs from. REQUIRED for send_transfer (the only write tool); a per-call `secret` arg overrides it. Not needed for any read tool. Treat like cash.
environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_SECRET_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Per-transaction spend cap in SOL for native SOL transfers via send_transfer. Bounds the blast radius of a leaked key or an injected argument.
environmentVariables.name: MAX_SOL_PER_TX

environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated base58 pubkeys. When set, send_transfer refuses any recipient not in the list.
environmentVariables.name: RECIPIENT_ALLOWLIST

environmentVariables.description: When on (default), send_transfer refuses until re-issued with confirm:true. Set 0/false to disable the gate.
environmentVariables.name: REQUIRE_CONFIRM

title: three.ws Portfolio
